prs.title: fix(auth): token refresh race on parallel tabs
prs.author: alice
prs.reason: This PR addresses a critical bug in the authentication system that can lead to users being logged out, severely impacting user experience and security.

prs.title: perf(executor): batch stream flush on high-QPS runs
prs.author: dave
prs.reason: This PR addresses a performance issue impacting p99 latency in high-QPS scenarios, which is critical for system stability and responsiveness.

prs.title: fix(scheduler): prevent duplicate fire on leader transition
prs.author: eve
prs.reason: This PR addresses a critical bug that can lead to duplicate task execution during leader transitions, impacting data integrity and resource utilization.

prs.title: security: redact api_key values in step_runs.params_json
prs.author: jack
prs.reason: This pull request addresses a critical security vulnerability by preventing sensitive API keys and tokens from being logged in plain text in the database, which could lead to unauthorized access if the database is compromised.

prs.title: feat(webhooks): signed delivery retry on 5xx
prs.author: bob
prs.reason: This PR adds important retry logic for webhook deliveries, improving reliability, but is not a critical bug fix or security patch.

prs.title: feat(mcp): workspace-scoped MCP server enable/disable
prs.author: frank
prs.reason: This is a new feature that introduces a significant change to how MCP servers are managed, potentially impacting multiple workspaces. While it has a good default for backward compatibility, it requires careful consideration and testing.

prs.title: fix(ui): dark-mode contrast on secondary buttons
prs.author: grace
prs.reason: This PR addresses a user-reported accessibility issue (WCAG AA contrast failure) in the UI, making it a medium severity fix due to direct user impact and compliance.

prs.title: refactor(storage): replace manual connection pool with asyncpg built-in
prs.author: henry
prs.reason: This PR refactors a core component (database connection pooling) which improves reliability and reduces code, impacting runtime stability and maintainability significantly, but without immediately critical user-facing issues.

prs.title: feat(api): bulk archive endpoint for pipelines
prs.author: iris
prs.reason: This PR adds a new bulk API endpoint, improving efficiency but also introducing a new API surface that needs review and testing.

prs.title: docs: clarify SMTP connector TLS mode options
prs.author: carol
prs.reason: This PR improves existing documentation by clarifying options for a connector, which is a low-risk change.
